title: UART peripheral-trait template
description: Tier 2/3/4 trait values for one (ip_name='usart'|'lpuart', ip_version=...) IP version.  Added by the peripheral-trait-template-library OpenSpec change.  Templates live at data/peripheral_traits/uart/<ip_version>.toml and are joined to peripheral instances by (ip_name, ip_version) during normalization.

template_revision.description: Bumps when any default below changes; recorded in per-peripheral provenance so device patches can pin against a known revision.

max_baud_hz.description: Maximum baud rate the IP can clock (Tier 2).

mode_flags.description: Boolean capability flags supported by this IP version (e.g. 'has_fifo', 'has_lin', 'has_smartcard', 'has_irda').
